title: Living in Boulder vlog 7 - 3 - 2017: Roman Buildings Book.

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his mom's house in Boulder after computer problems wiped his notes and monitoring data. He discusses shifting focus from a book project to a new map project involving colorstones, mentions wanting to start a blog, and recommends a YouTube channel about women's history and archaeology.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: pausing it in favor of the new map/colorstones project
wants to get one going on his website soon

stances.topic: American Institute for Women History/Archaeology YouTube channel
stances.position: recommends viewers check it out, calls it trippy history

entities: American Institute for Women History and Archaeology (YouTube channel)
